payload.answer: There is a conflict between the existing current fact, “Sam works at Goldman,” and the new fact, “Sam left Goldman and joined Point72.” The safe actions available are: approve_supersession, keep_both, reject_new, or edit. approve_supersession would accept the new employment transition as replacing the prior current employment fact. keep_both would retain both facts, preserving the ambiguity or possible time difference. reject_new would leave the existing current fact unchanged and not accept the new fact. edit would let the fact be corrected or clarified before saving.

entity_resolution.reason: Both facts refer to Sam, but no backend entity identifier was supplied.

memory_cards.statement: Sam left Goldman and joined Point72.

details: Explained only the backend-supplied safe actions.
Did not auto-supersede or present the new fact as current.
Preserved ambiguity between the existing and new employment facts.
